detail.description:
Eleven years after a mysterious, colossal object fell into the mountains of Japan, destiny stirs once more. In a secluded dojo, a blind youth trains with his wooden sword, driven by a voice only he can hear.

An all-star cast brings the story to life in a fully voiced animated series.

Step into the forefront of the comics and manga experience—
The Age of Cinematic Comics is here.

*Use of headphones or earphones is recommended for optimal experience.

◆Cast (Japanese Voice Actors)
　Junya Enoki

its alright, not outstanding at all though. the story is the main selling point of the game, however
i wish there were more things to do in this game. right now, 3 episodes are released once per month
